source_pr.title: gc_worker: make deleteRanges concurrent
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #54570

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

Start multiple goroutines to do delete range.

Manual test
```
PR-5000-6 threads
[gc_worker.go:898] ["finish delete ranges"] [category="gc worker"] [uuid=6428301a0380018] ["num of ranges"=5000] ["cost time"=10.927240956s]

PR-2000-6 threads
[gc_worker.go:898] ["finish delete ranges"] [category="gc worker"] [uuid=642828291ac0013] ["num of ranges"=2000] ["cost time"=4.316628012s]

master-5000
[gc_worker.go:875] ["finish delete ranges"] [category="gc worker"] [uuid=64282a1e8540002] ["num of ranges"=5000] ["cost time"=39.029690356s]

master-2000
[gc_worker.go:875] ["finish delete ranges"] [category="gc worker"] [uuid=64282a1e8540002] ["num of ranges"=2000] ["cost time"=15.605985272s]
```


### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
`tidb_gc_concurrency` also affects the delete_range procedure now.
```

symptoms: sort.Slice(stores, func(i, j int) bool { return stores[i].Address < stores[j].Address }) (pkg/store/gcworker/gc_worker_test.go)
failure_signature: sort.Slice(stores, func(i, j int) bool { return stores[i].Address < stores[j].Address }) (pkg/store/gcworker/gc_worker_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sort.Slice(stores, func(i, j int) bool { return stores[i].Address < stores[j].Address }) (pkg/store/gcworker/gc_worker_test.go)
